title: exclusive Uniface Server
text: exclusive Uniface Server A Uniface Server that is accessed directly from the component rather than via the Uniface Router. The Uniface Router is required to establish the connection, after which it plays no further role. Related Links Uniface Server A server-based process that enables Uniface clients to access remote resources, or to execute remote components. By default, the Uniface Server acts as the Uniface Virtual Machine, and supports remote application invocation and remote data access. The Uniface Router is responsible for all communication between the client and server, except for exclusive Uniface Servers. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
